short_term.headline: US-Iran war escalates as missiles strike Gulf military bases
short_term.impact: Crude oil price spike benefits domestic explorers but hurts refiners.

short_term.headline: India routes energy imports through UAE to avoid Hormuz
short_term.impact: Shipping firms adapt while oil marketing companies face higher freight costs.

short_term.headline: RBI announces VRR auction to ease banking system liquidity
short_term.impact: Short-term liquidity injection supports private banks over public lenders.

short_term.headline: Monsoon deficit narrows to 19% but crop risks persist
short_term.impact: Uneven rains boost fertilizer demand but threaten FMCG margins.

short_term.headline: US tightens visa rules for Indian students and professionals
short_term.impact: Negative sentiment hits major IT exporters reliant on onsite talent.

long_term.headline: Cabinet approves massive funding for Semiconductor Mission 2.0
long_term.impact: Long-term boost for domestic electronics manufacturing and chip suppliers.

long_term.headline: NTPC joint venture floats massive nuclear power plant tender
long_term.impact: Accelerates clean energy transition, reducing long-term coal reliance.

long_term.headline: Deloitte forecasts steady GDP growth of up to 6.8%
long_term.impact: Sustained economic expansion drives credit growth for private lenders.

long_term.headline: Government plans digital land record integration for farm loans
long_term.impact: Streamlines rural lending, boosting credit growth for public banks.

long_term.headline: Government designs next phase of food processing PLI scheme
long_term.impact: Long-term margin expansion for organized food processing players.
